title: stelis hallii var. atra
intro: Stelis hallii var. atra is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Stelis hallii orchid plant, characterized by its dark-colored leaves and stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Native American herbalism, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis hallii var. atra include its potential to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
